name: DESOLATION ENGINE

abilities.name: Blind Rage
abilities.text: Once per activation. After resolving an attack targeting this model which received one or more raises, this model may drain a (soulstone) to declare an action.

abilities.name: Juggernaut
abilities.text: This model reduces all damage dealt to it to 3 (if more than 3).

abilities.name: Ruthless
abilities.text: This model ignores the (unusual_defense) abilities of other models.

actions.name: Desolate Warping
actions.effects: Damage from this attack is irreducible. If the target is not a peon and is killed, this model may summon an Abomination within 1" of it.

triggers.name: Shrug Off
triggers.text: Remove one token from this model.

triggers.name: Severe Injury
triggers.text: When resolving, if the target has an Injured token, deal +1 damage to it. Otherwise, it gains an Injured token.

actions.name: Draw Essence
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. Remove all tokens from the target. This model gains all tokens removed in this way.

triggers.name: Consume
triggers.text: Friendly only. Kill the target. This model heals an amount equal to the target's health.

actions.name: Spittle-Flecked Roar
actions.effects: Enemy models within range must pass a TN 13 Wp duel or gain a Slow token and be dealt 1 damage.

triggers.name: Sudden Strike
triggers.text: This model may declare a (melee) action.

extraction_notes: The Ruthless ability shows a defensive icon symbol which I've rendered as (unusual_defense) based on the shield icon visible in the text
